---
title: "Publications"
description-meta: "Peer-reviewed journal articles by Andrés André Camargo Bertel"
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  - id: papers
    contents: posts
    include:
      categories: [paper]
    type: custom
    template: assets/paper-card.ejs
    page-size: 100
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
css: assets/paper-listing.css
---

Peer-reviewed journal articles. See also my profiles on
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=RTRoJm0AAAAJ){target="_blank"},
[Scopus](https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=59319653100){target="_blank"}, and
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8192-8254){target="_blank"}.

## Journal Articles

::: {#papers}
:::

## Manuscripts Under Review

- C. Lizarazo, **A. A. Camargo-Bertel**, J. Fajardo, L. Corredor, A. González-Quiroga, and O. Pupo-Roncallo. "A scenario-based model for assessing hydrogen production pathways in Colombia with horizons 2030 and 2050." *(Under review).*
- **A. A. Camargo-Bertel**, P. Forero-Ocho, A. M. Orozco-Idrobo, A. González-Quiroga, and O. Pupo-Roncallo. "Strategies, barriers, and policies for decarbonizing road transport in Latin America." *(Under review).*

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
